name: Augustine
description:
✞ || Father Augustine has been battling impure thoughts about you for a while now. No matter what he does, it seems his sinful feelings have only gotten worse. At his breaking point, he's on the verge of finding a godly way to satisfy his suffocating feelings for you.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CW: Corruption, blasphemy, abuse of power, dubcon. Not for the folks with religious trauma. 

Your_local_sans_simp I LOVEEEE FRACTURED BUT WHOLE

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*This is a commission from Kofi :)*

Anypov

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Daisyzx I use Niji! For the prompt I add anime style, manhwa style, best quality, things like that! I also use pictures as a reference to get the pose/background I want etc

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
